Article Title: Iman Shumpert’s ex Teyana Taylor makes candid admission about their kids amid Hollywood star’s Oscar buzz: “They’re my co-stylists”
Article Text:
Teyana Taylor, Iman Tayla Shumpert Jr., Rue Rose Shumpert, and Iman Shumpert. Image via: Unique Nicole/ Getty Images

Iman Shumpert’s ex Teyana Taylor asks her kids for fashion approval



Teyana Taylor and her two kids Junie and Rue. Image via: Emma McIntyre/ Getty Images

Teyana Taylor explains co-parenting with Iman Shumpert



Image via: Teyana Taylor/ Instagram

As awards season cameras flash, Iman Shumpert’s ex Teyana Taylor has become a fixture on the red carpet. The Harlem native earned a best supporting actress Oscar nomination and a Golden Globe win for her role in One Battle After Another, turning heads in Burberry, Schiaparelli and Tamara Ralph gowns along the way. Behind the couture and spotlight, Taylor credits two familiar voices for shaping her final look each night.And the final thoughts belong to her daughters, Junie, 10, and Rue, 5, whom she shares with former NBA player Shumpert. As her Hollywood profile rises with an Oscar nod, Taylor says her children have been at the center of her stunning looks.Teyana Taylor approaches major appearances with a clear routine. She collaborates directly with designers, reviews sketches, and then turns to her daughters for the final word.“They’re my co-stylists,” Taylor says with a laugh. “With the big awards shows, I design directly with the designer. And then I turn to my babies like, ‘What y’all think about this? Do I do the one with the party in the back or the party in the front?’” (via USA Today).Her daughters offer their own commentary. “like, ‘Ooh, Mommy, what’s this?’ ” Taylor adds. “They’re about to be fashionistas. They definitely have final approval on how I walk out that door.”After the Golden Globes, Taylor headed home before attending after-parties. “before I could even get to any real parties, it was like, ‘OK, Mommy, you can go out, but can you just read us a bedtime story first?’ I'm lying in bed with my Golden Globe like, ‘All right!’ ” Taylor says. “When I tell you I never made it out (laughs). And they do it to me every single time ‒ I know it's a setup by now. My girls are like, ‘We are the party! We're going to Club Bed!’ ”At the Palm Springs International Film Festival, she experienced another candid moment. “The moment it was time for me to get my award, these little rascals were literally on their phones!” Taylor says. “I had to tell them midspeech, ‘Get off them phones!’ It was just so funny, and it brightened up the whole room that I had this real mom moment in the middle of all this. But that's why I love having them with me, because they calm my nerves. It makes me proud to make them proud ‒ they're everything.”Taylor has spoken openly about co-parenting with Shumpert following their divorce, finalized in July 2024.“Divorce, to me, is you’re grieving the death of a living being,” Taylor told Vanity Fair in January this year. “I think once children are involved, you understand the importance of really still having to show up for each other.”“At least for the next 18 years, and being the best co-parents that we can be,” she continued, adding that she does not “want people to start feeling scared of marriage, because marriage is a beautiful thing.”When announcing their separation, she wrote, “In all fairness, Iman and I are separated and have been for a while. To be 1000% clear, ‘infidelity’ ain’t one of the reasons for our departure. We are still the best of friends, great business partners and are one hell of a team when it comes to co-parenting our 2 beautiful children.”“Most importantly we are FAMILY & in the 10yrs together, 7yrs married, we ain’t ever played with or about THAT,” she added.The former couple is now focused on their kids following their divorce battle.
Article Summary: Teyana Taylor credits her two daughters for shaping her final look each night. The former couple is now focused on their kids following their divorce. The Harlem native earned a best supporting actress Oscar nomination and a Golden Globe win for her role in One Battle After Another.

Article Title: Who is Jontay Porter? Ex-Toronto Raptors star with lifetime NBA ban makes new career move
Article Text:
Jontay Porter. Image via: Kamil Krzaczynski/NBAE via Getty Images

Who is Jontay Porter?



Jontay Porter. Image via: Alika Jenner/ Getty Images

What happened to Jontay Porter?



Jontay Porter makes a new career move outside the NBA



At 26, Jontay Porter is preparing for his first professional game in nearly two years. The former Toronto Raptors big man, who received a lifetime NBA ban in 2024 for violating league gambling rules, has signed with the Seattle SuperHawks of the relaunched United States Basketball League. The team confirmed the move on February 25, with the season set to begin in early March.If Porter takes the floor on March 7, it will mark a significant step in a career that once showed promise before being derailed by a federal investigation. “I am just trying to do what I can to provide for my family,” Porter told The Athletic. His return comes while he awaits sentencing after pleading guilty to conspiracy to commit wire fraud.Born on November 15, 1999, in Columbia, Missouri, Jontay Porter played college basketball at Missouri before entering the professional ranks. He appeared in 37 NBA games across two seasons, including 26 with Toronto during the 2023-24 campaign. That year, he averaged 4.4 points, 3.2 rebounds, and 2.3 assists in a reserve role.Porter is also the brother of Brooklyn Nets forward Michael Porter Jr. Standing 6-foot-10, he built his game around versatility and floor spacing.The USBL, where Porter is now headed, previously operated from 1985 to 2008 and sent more than 150 players to the NBA. The league relaunched with eight West Coast teams, offering a structured platform for players seeking competitive opportunities.The NBA banned Porter for life after determining he violated league gambling policies. According to league findings, he intentionally limited his participation in two games to influence prop bets tied to his performance. Investigators also found that he disclosed confidential health information to someone connected to a bettor before a game.The league stated that Porter placed 13 bets on NBA games using another person’s account, with wagers ranging from $15 to $22,000. While none of those bets involved games he played in, he did place bets involving the Raptors.Federal prosecutors later charged Porter with conspiracy to commit wire fraud. He pleaded guilty in 2024 and is awaiting sentencing. His attorney previously said he had been “in over his head due to a gambling addiction.”Porter attempted to resume his career overseas, though a federal judge denied his request to play in Greece. His signing with the Seattle SuperHawks now gives him a domestic opportunity in the USBL’s reopening season.Seattle opens its schedule on March 7 against the Lilac City Legends.
Article Summary: Jontay Porter has signed with the Seattle SuperHawks of the relaunched United States Basketball League. The 26-year-old was banned from the NBA for life in 2024 for violating league gambling rules. He pleaded guilty to conspiracy to commit wire fraud and is awaiting sentencing.

The body-con fit flowed into a soft flare at the hem.She paired the look with ultra-long, jet-black hair styled sleek and straight with a middle part. Her makeup leaned into a 90s-inspired brown glam aesthetic, complete with a defined ombré lip and neutral smoky eyes. A deep burgundy manicure further enhanced the earthy tones of the gown.Milan proved to be a runway of its own. During another outing, Megan embraced a preppy twist with a cropped cardigan from Thom Browne and a khaki sarong-style skirt by Fanci Club. The asymmetrical waistband and thigh-high slit added edge, while accessories such as the brand’s Hector dog-shaped bag completed the polished look.She also wore a striped cropped T-shirt from Vaquera with high-waisted black jeans, pairing it with a beret and chainlink choker. Earlier in the week, she turned heads in a yellow polka-dot Daisy Jumpsuit from JLorraine Designs, featuring a halter neckline and low back, while vibing to her song “Spin.”
Article Summary: Klay Thompson’s girlfriend, Megan Thee Stallion, stepped out in a sheer crochet halter gown that quickly became one of the most talked-about celebrity fashion moments of the week. The floor-length look, crafted in a rich chocolate tone, blended daring design with refined details.

Article Title: James Harden injury update: Is Cavaliers star playing tonight against Bucks?
Article Text:
James Harden. Image via: NBA.com

James Harden injury update : Latest status on Cavaliers star tonight against Bucks



James Harden's stats with the Cavaliers



The Cleveland Cavaliers will be without one of their biggest midseason additions on Wednesday night. The team confirmed that James Harden will not suit up against the Milwaukee Bucks after suffering a non-displaced fracture in his right thumb during Tuesday’s win over the New York Knicks. The injury affects his non-shooting hand, yet Cleveland is choosing caution on the second night of a back-to-back.Harden’s absence comes at a delicate time. The Cavaliers are also missing Donovan Mitchell and Evan Mobley, leaving a thin rotation heading into an Eastern Conference matchup in Milwaukee. While the veteran guard plans to play through the injury long term, the team is managing swelling and pain before clearing him for full action.The latest James Harden injury update confirms he is out against the Bucks. Earlier in the day, ESPN insider Shams Charania provided clarity on the situation. “There’s going to be a lot of managing of the pain through treatment over the next few days,” Charania said on NBA Today. “He might sit tonight in Milwaukee to let that thumb calm down.”Further evaluation brought encouraging news. “James Harden has been evaluated by a hand specialist, and I’m told he plans to play through that fracture in his right thumb moving forward,” Charania reported on NBA Today.“No surgery is required, so he will be playing on.” The update from the team on X revealed that Harden was listed as questionable.Harden addressed the bigger picture after Tuesday’s victory. “We got what, 25 games? I think we can get there,” Harden said. “Matter of fact, I know we can get there. I think it’s going to start defensively because offensively we can have six guys in double figures. Defensive is going to be key. If we can really hone in defensively and get stops, we’re going to be very, very tough.”With Harden sidelined, Cleveland is expected to rely heavily on Jarrett Allen, Dennis Schroder, Sam Merrill, Jaylon Tyson, and Keon Ellis. The projected lineup places added playmaking pressure on Schroder while Allen anchors the paint.Since arriving from the Los Angeles Clippers, Harden has made an immediate impact. In seven games with Cleveland, he is averaging 18.9 points, 8.0 assists, and 4.6 rebounds. The Cavaliers have gone 6–1 in that span, climbing firmly into the Eastern Conference race.His shooting efficiency and ball control have stabilized late-game possessions. Even with a fractured thumb, the expectation remains that Harden will continue contributing once cleared.
Article Summary: Cleveland Cavaliers confirm James Harden will not play against Milwaukee Bucks. Harden suffered a non-displaced fracture in his right thumb during Tuesday’s win over the New York Knicks. The team is managing swelling and pain before clearing him for full action.

Boston Celtics vs Denver Nuggets Prediction (February 25, 2026)

Theplay theon, at Ball Arena. Both teams are in the playoff race, so this game matters for seeding.Boston is near the top in the East, while Denver is holding a strong position in the West. Injuries on both sides will have a direct impact on how this game plays out.Jayson Tatum is out with an Achilles injury. That leaves Boston without its main scorer.Jaylen Brown is available after dealing with a right knee contusion in the last game. He is expected to take on a bigger role. Derrick White will also have more responsibility, especially in handling the ball and creating shots.Boston will need production from multiple players to make up for Tatum’s absence.Denver Nuggets are missing several players. Aaron Gordon and Peyton Watson are both out with hamstring injuries. Jalen Pickett is out with a knee issue, and Tamar Bates is sidelined with a foot injury.Jamal Murray is a game-time decision because of a hamstring problem. Julian Strawther is listed as questionable with a toe injury.These absences reduce Denver’s depth, especially on the wings.Boston is expected to start Derrick White and Baylor Scheierman in the backcourt, with Jaylen Brown on the wing.Nikola Vucevic will handle duties in the frontcourt.Denver is expected to start Nikola Jokic at center. If Jamal Murray plays, he will start at point guard. Christian Braun, Cameron Johnson, and Jonas Valanciunas are expected to fill the remaining spots.Denver has won the only meeting between the two teams this season, giving them a 1-0 edge. Over the last three years, the teams are tied 2-2.Boston still leads the all-time regular-season record 62-41.Boston allows the fewest points per game in the league. Denver scores efficiently and shoots well from three.Nikola Jokic against Nikola Vucevic is the main matchup inside. Jokic creates chances for teammates, while Vucevic focuses on scoring.Derrick White will have an important role on defense and in attack, especially if Jamal Murray plays.Boston’s defense gives them a chance even without Tatum. Denver has the advantage at home and still has Jokic.This should be a close game with a slower pace. The total is likely to stay under 225 points.
Article Summary: Denver has won the only meeting between the two teams this season, giving them a 1-0 edge. Injuries on both sides will have a direct impact on how this game plays out.
